results.notes: Main reindex path uses withBusyRetry; quarantine insert/recover/count bypass the same helper.
Lane modules are clear, but lane addition requires synchronized edits across types, empty score shape, fusion, weights, schema, and docs.
README documents the intent; executable contract shapes are duplicated across TS daemon probe, Python inline bridge, OpenCode bridge, and plugin parser.
Advisor handlers use Zod output schemas; skill-graph handlers hand-roll local HandlerResponse/okResponse/errorResponse helpers.
README identifies plugin plus bridge boundary and stable compat entrypoint; bridge imports dist/skill_advisor/compat/index.js.
SQLite skill-graph fixture setup is duplicated between advisor DB tests and server skill-graph handler tests.
Seven shipped sub-tracks are collapsed into a single umbrella ADR.
No orphaned import proven; path drift remains prior finding and source-signature hyphen path is not re-flagged.
